hero.headline: Global Real Estate Intelligence, translated into local action.
hero.subheadline: Every week, we decode what the world's best real estate firms are doing — and show you exactly how to apply it in your market.

approach.label: Our Approach
approach.headline: The market is global. So should you be.
approach.col1_body: We go deep into the practices of the world's top real estate firms — from the US to the UK, from Italy to the Middle East — and translate that intelligence into actionable content for professionals in Portuguese-speaking markets. No filters, no empty jargon.
approach.col2_body: We're not a news digest. We're a strategic intelligence platform: every issue brings a real case study, a proven technique, and one concrete step you can implement this week.
approach.quote: Globalle: a platform connecting the real estate market to the world through content that matters to every professional in the industry.

manifesto.label: Manifesto
manifesto.headline: Why the world needs real estate professionals with a global mindset
manifesto.p1: We live in a world where capital moves in real time — where buyers in Lisbon purchase in Miami and investors in São Paulo choose properties in Portugal before ever setting foot there. Yet the professionals who should be guiding those decisions are still learning almost exclusively within their own borders.
manifesto.p2: That's not their fault. It's a matter of access.
manifesto.p3: The knowledge that defines excellence in global real estate — the conversion scripts used by New York's top brokers, the onboarding model that London's largest agencies use for new consultants, the way Italian developers build local brands with international reach — rarely makes it, in Portuguese, to the people who need it most.
manifesto.p4: Globalle was built to change that.
manifesto.p5: We're not a market news aggregator. We're a strategic intelligence clearinghouse: we do the research, interview the right people, distill what's essential, and deliver it in a language any ambitious professional can pick up and apply.
manifesto.p6: We believe the next generation of great real estate names in Portugal and Brazil won't only be shaped by access to the best schools or the best local mentors. They'll be shaped by the curiosity to look outward — and the discipline to translate that perspective into action.
manifesto.p7: That's what Globalle delivers, week after week.
manifesto.closing: The borders are open. Come build with us.

mvv.label: Identity
mvv.headline: Mission, Vision & Values
mvv.mission_body: To be the strategic partner of real estate professionals who want to grow beyond their borders, delivering global market intelligence in a way that is accessible, actionable, and continuous.
mvv.vision_body: To become, within 3 years, the largest multilingual real estate newsletter (PT/EN/IT/ES) — the essential reference for industry professionals across Portuguese-speaking and Iberian-language markets.

values.title: Responsibility & Ethics
values.body: We are committed to rigorous information, verified sources, and full transparency.

values.title: Constant Transformation
values.body: We evolve with the market. We never stop learning or adapting what we deliver.

values.title: Innovation with Purpose
values.body: We innovate to solve real problems — not to chase trends.

values.title: Respect & Active Listening
values.body: We listen to our readers and partners. Your experience shapes our content.

values.title: Continuous Learning
values.body: We are the first students of what we teach. Intellectual humility is non-negotiable.

values.title: Trust & Honesty
values.body: We build long-term relationships. Trust is our most valuable asset.

cards.title: Intelligent Interview Curation
cards.body: We access top professionals from markets like the US, UK, Italy, and UAE. Every issue brings perspectives you won't find in Portuguese anywhere else.

cards.title: Cultural + Technical Insight
cards.body: It's not just the 'what' — it's the 'cultural why'. We understand that American market practices can't be copied. They have to be translated. That's exactly what we do.

cards.title: Deep Real Estate Experience
cards.body: Our founding team has direct experience in transactions, team management, and real estate development across Portugal, Brazil, and international markets.

cards.title: A Community Built to Grow
cards.body: Our readers aren't passive. They're professionals who apply what they read, share results, and build together. The community is part of the product.

products.label: Products
products.headline: What Globalle offers
products.newsletter_body: The heart of Globalle. Every week, an in-depth analysis of a global real estate practice, case study, or trend — in Portuguese, English, and Italian. Free. No spam. Cancel anytime.
products.podcast_body: Long-form, unfiltered interviews with real estate professionals from around the world. The perfect complement to the newsletter — for your commute, the gym, or between client visits.
products.consultoria_body: For teams and agencies ready to go beyond content and turn intelligence into concrete processes. From adopting new techniques to full operational restructuring.

final_cta.headline: Start thinking globally today
final_cta.subheadline: Join hundreds of professionals already receiving global real estate intelligence every week.

newsletter_form.success: Thank you! Check your inbox to confirm your subscription.
newsletter_form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
newsletter_form.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

consultoria.label: Advisory
consultoria.headline: Turn intelligence into results
consultoria.subheadline: Choose the plan that fits your team or agency's current stage.

plans.name: Group Application
plans.description: For teams that want to implement new practices in a structured, supported way.
features: Access to all playbooks and SOP/training library
1 monthly group session to apply the week's playbook
Ready-to-use templates (sales scripts, agent onboarding, etc.)

plans.name: Strategic
plans.description: For leaders and agencies who want a strategic partner with personalized support.

plans.name: Custom Project
plans.description: For large operations requiring full restructuring or high-complexity projects.

faqs.q: Is the advisory in-person or remote?
faqs.a: The Group Application and Strategic plans are 100% remote (video calls and private group). Custom Projects may include in-person components depending on location and scope.

faqs.q: Can I start on one plan and upgrade later?
faqs.a: Yes. Most of our clients start with Group Application and upgrade to Strategic after their first results. The process is straightforward with no additional transition costs.

faqs.q: Do the plans include newsletter access?
faqs.a: Yes. All advisory plans include access to the premium newsletter with exclusive analyses not published in the free version.

faqs.q: Do you work with agencies in Portugal and Brazil?
faqs.a: Yes. We have clients in Portugal, Brazil, and in international Portuguese-speaking markets. Content and sessions are adapted to each client's local market.

contato.label: Contact
contato.headline: Get in touch
contato.subheadline: Have a question, want to learn more about our advisory, or interested in collaborating with Globalle? Drop us a message.
contato.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 48 hours.

footer.tagline: Global real estate intelligence, every week.
